1.1.0.en: Added Router Reboot flow card. Fixed ul/dl speed monitoring. Improved phone presence detection. Improved translations.

1.2.0.en: Added WOL, SSID on/off, radio on/off, block/allow device and deviceIsOnline flow cards. Fixed etherwake installed check. Updated readme. Code fixes and improvements.

1.2.1.en: Reduced router CPU load. Improved translations.

1.3.0.en: Added online detection, CPU scaling and many wifi metrics. Added WAN/LAN blocking buttons. Reduced router load. Improved 25.12 compatibility. Improved translations.
